title: emilia zeylanica var. zeylanica
intro: Emilia zeylanica var. zeylanica, also known as the Ceylon weed or fingered leaf thistle, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Emilia zeylanica var. zeylanica include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and aiding in digestion. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
